
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jireh Corporation of Georgia — Brand Foundation</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400;1,500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');

  :root {
    --black:       #0F0E0B;
    --navy:        #0C2044;
    --navy-mid:    #1A3A6A;
    --navy-light:  #E8EEF8;
    --gold:        #C8960A;
    --gold-light:  #E8B832;
    --gold-pale:   #F5EDD4;
    --red:         #9C1A1A;
    --orange:      #C84A0A;
    --white:       #FAFAF6;
    --off:         #F3EFE5;
    --rule:        #D8D0BC;
    --text:        #1E1C17;
    --muted:       #6A6456;
    --label:       #9A9080;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    background: var(--white);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ── COVER ── */
  .cover {
    background: var(--navy);
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 80px 60px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .cover::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      -45deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 60px,
      rgba(200,150,10,0.03) 60px,
      rgba(200,150,10,0.03) 61px
    );
  }
  .cover-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  /* SVG logo mark embedded in cover */
  .cover-mark {
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }

  .cover-title {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 62px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    letter-spacing: 10px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .cover-subtitle {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--gold);
    letter-spacing: 5px;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .cover-rule {
    width: 320px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin: 0 auto 20px;
  }
  .cover-verse {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .cover-ref {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--gold);
    opacity: 0.7;
  }
  .cover-meta {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 40px;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  }

  /* ── PAGE LAYOUT ── */
  .page {
    max-width: 960px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 80px 60px;
  }
  .page + .page {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .page-dark {
    background: var(--navy);
    max-width: 100%;
    padding: 80px 0;
  }
  .page-dark .page {
    border-top: none;
  }
  .page-off {
    background: var(--off);
    max-width: 100%;
    padding: 80px 0;
  }
  .page-off .page { border-top: none; }

  /* ── SECTION HEADERS ── */
  .section-number {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--gold);
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .section-title-light {
    color: #FFFFFF;
  }
  .section-rule {
    width: 48px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .section-intro {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    max-width: 660px;
  }

  /* ── BRAND STORY ── */
  .brand-story p {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .brand-story p strong {
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--navy);
  }
  .pull-quote {
    border-left: 3px solid var(--gold);
    padding: 20px 28px;
    margin: 36px 0;
    background: var(--gold-pale);
    border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
  }
  .pull-quote p {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--navy);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .pull-quote cite {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* ── UMBRELLA STRUCTURE ── */
  .umbrella-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .umbrella-parent {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    background: var(--navy);
    padding: 36px 40px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .umbrella-parent::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 2px;
    height: 24px;
    background: var(--gold);
  }
  .umbrella-parent-name {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .umbrella-parent-sub {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .umbrella-parent-desc {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
    margin-top: 12px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .connector-row {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    height: 28px;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .connector-row::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 25%;
    right: 25%;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
    opacity: 0.4;
  }
  .division-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    padding: 28px 32px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--gold);
  }
  .division-card.active {
    border-top-color: var(--navy);
    background: var(--navy-light);
  }
  .division-card.pipeline {
    border-top-color: var(--orange);
    opacity: 0.85;
  }
  .division-card.future {
    border-top-color: var(--rule);
    opacity: 0.7;
  }
  .div-tag {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .div-tag.active-tag { color: var(--navy); }
  .div-tag.pipeline-tag { color: var(--orange); }
  .div-tag.future-tag { color: var(--label); }
  .div-name {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .div-desc {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .div-detail {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--label);
    margin-top: 10px;
    padding-top: 10px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ── COLOR SYSTEM ── */
  .color-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .color-swatch {
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .swatch-block {
    height: 100px;
  }
  .swatch-info {
    padding: 12px 14px;
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-top: none;
  }
  .swatch-name {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .swatch-hex {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--label);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
  .swatch-use {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 6px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .color-secondary {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 16px;
  }
  .swatch-mini {
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    padding: 4px 8px;
  }
  .swatch-mini span {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9.5px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  /* ── TYPOGRAPHY ── */
  .type-specimen {
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    padding-bottom: 36px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .type-specimen:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .type-label {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9.5px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .type-role {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 12px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ── LOGO SYSTEM ── */
  .logo-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .logo-cell {
    padding: 48px 40px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0;
    min-height: 220px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .logo-cell-dark { background: var(--navy); }
  .logo-cell-light { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .logo-cell-gold { background: var(--gold); }
  .logo-cell-off { background: var(--off); border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .logo-caption {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 14px;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    text-align: center;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .logo-caption-light { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }
  .logo-caption-dark { color: var(--label); }

  /* ── VOICE & TONE ── */
  .tone-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .tone-card {
    padding: 32px;
    background: var(--off);
  }
  .tone-card-alt {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .tone-card h4 {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .tone-card ul {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .tone-card ul li {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--muted);
    padding: 7px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .tone-card ul li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .tone-card ul li::before {
    content: '—';
    color: var(--gold);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-top: 1px;
  }
  .do { color: #1A4A2E; }
  .dont { color: var(--red); }

  /* ── TAGLINE CANDIDATES ── */
  .tagline-list {
    margin-top: 40px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .tagline-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 24px 32px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    gap: 28px;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  .tagline-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .tagline-num {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--gold);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    min-width: 32px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .tagline-text {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 24px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--navy);
    flex: 1;
  }
  .tagline-note {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--label);
    text-align: right;
    min-width: 140px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  /* ── APPLICATION TABLE ── */
  table.app-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  table.app-table thead tr {
    background: var(--navy);
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  table.app-table thead th {
    padding: 14px 18px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 9.5px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  table.app-table tbody tr {
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  table.app-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
    background: var(--off);
  }
  table.app-table tbody td {
    padding: 14px 18px;
    color: var(--muted);
    vertical-align: top;
  }
  table.app-table tbody td:first-child {
    color: var(--navy);
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  .doc-footer {
    background: var(--black);
    padding: 60px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .doc-footer-title {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .doc-footer-sub {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9.5px;
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .doc-footer-rule {
    width: 80px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin: 0 auto 20px;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  .doc-footer-meta {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ── PRINT / UTILITY ── */
  .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .badge-gold { background: var(--gold-pale); color: var(--gold); }
  .badge-navy { background: var(--navy-light); color: var(--navy); }
  .badge-red { background: #F8ECEC; color: var(--red); }

  @media print {
    .cover { min-height: auto; padding: 60px; }
    .cover-title { font-size: 48px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     COVER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="cover">
  <div class="cover-eyebrow">PEDISON USA CORPORATION · CAPITAL SOLUTIONS DIVISION · CONFIDENTIAL</div>

  <div style="height:20px;"></div>

  <div class="cover-title">JIREH</div>
  <div class="cover-subtitle">CORPORATION OF GEORGIA</div>
  <div class="cover-rule"></div>
  <div class="cover-verse">On the mountain of the Lord it will be provided.</div>
  <div class="cover-ref">GENESIS 22:14 · JEHOVAH JIREH · THE LORD WILL PROVIDE</div>

  <div class="cover-meta">BRAND FOUNDATION · JUNE 2026 · PREPARED BY PEDISON USA CORPORATION · CSA-2026-0526-JCG · CONFIDENTIAL</div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 1 — BRAND STORY
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page" style="padding-top:80px;">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 01</div>
  <div class="section-title">The Brand Story</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>

  <div class="brand-story">
    <p>
      The name <strong>Jireh</strong> is not a marketing choice. It is a declaration. Drawn from 
      Genesis 22:14 — the moment Abraham named the mountain where God intervened and provided a ram 
      in place of his son — <em>Jehovah Jireh</em> means <strong>the Lord will provide</strong>. 
      In the literal Hebrew, it means <em>the God who sees ahead</em>.
    </p>
    <p>
      David Richardson Little named his company after that mountain because he understands 
      what it means to climb one in obedience, not knowing what you will find at the top. 
      Jireh Corporation of Georgia was founded on May 23, 2011. What began as a single 
      enterprise has grown into a multi-vertical holding platform spanning transportation, 
      manufacturing, community development, renewable energy, technology infrastructure, and 
      international operations.
    </p>

    <div class="pull-quote">
      <p>"Jireh combines business ownership, job creation, workforce development, and community 
      investment into one unified ecosystem. Success is measured not only by financial growth 
      but by lasting economic and social impact."</p>
      <cite>— DAVID R. LITTLE, OWNER &amp; CEO · JIREH CORPORATION OF GEORGIA</cite>
    </div>

    <p>
      The brand must carry that weight. It is not a trucking company's logo. It is not a 
      startup's identity. It is the mark of a <strong>diversified holding company</strong> 
      being built for generational impact — a platform from which David Little intends to 
      create sustainable economic growth, job opportunities, and legacy for communities 
      across Georgia, the Southeast, and ultimately Uganda.
    </p>
    <p>
      Every visual decision in this brand foundation — the colors, the mark, the typography, 
      the voice — must reflect that gravity. <strong>Authoritative. Infrastructure-driven. 
      Faith-rooted. Built to last.</strong>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 2 — HOLDING COMPANY ARCHITECTURE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-off">
<div class="page">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 02</div>
  <div class="section-title">Corporate Architecture</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>
  <p class="section-intro">
    Jireh Corporation of Georgia is the parent holding entity. All subsidiary companies, 
    acquired businesses, and future ventures operate beneath this umbrella. The brand is 
    deliberately broad by design.
  </p>

  <div class="umbrella-grid">

    <!-- Parent -->
    <div class="umbrella-parent">
      <div class="umbrella-parent-sub">HOLDING COMPANY · PARENT ENTITY · EST. 2011 · DUBLIN, GA</div>
      <div class="umbrella-parent-name">JIREH CORPORATION OF GEORGIA</div>
      <div class="umbrella-parent-desc">
        A diversified holding company that acquires, develops, and manages businesses across 
        transportation, manufacturing, community development, renewable energy, healthcare support, 
        and workforce development. Corporate home: 300 Covington Cove, Byron, GA 31008.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="connector-row"></div>

    <!-- Column 1: Active / In Acquisition -->
    <div class="division-card active">
      <div class="div-tag active-tag">ACTIVE · IN ACQUISITION</div>
      <div class="div-name">JDS Express LLC</div>
      <div class="div-desc">
        Intermodal drayage trucking operation. Primary operating subsidiary under acquisition. 
        43 trucks, 62 drivers, Port of Savannah contracts, Garden City, GA terminal.
      </div>
      <div class="div-detail">
        Lanes: GA · NC · SC · AL · FL · TN · IN<br>
        Freight: Containers · Dry Van · Flatbed · Reefer<br>
        Primary client: Evans Delivery / Inland Port<br>
        Acquisition: $27.8M · Phase 1 · Allion Fund 1 LP<br>
        <span class="badge badge-navy">LOGISTICS DIVISION</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card active">
      <div class="div-tag active-tag">ADVISORY RAISE · IN PROGRESS</div>
      <div class="div-name">Fast-Tek Express LLC</div>
      <div class="div-desc">
        Standalone general freight trucking entity to be acquired and capitalized through 
        Pedison Advisory. Adds general freight capacity to the combined logistics platform.
      </div>
      <div class="div-detail">
        Capital raise: $5M minimum<br>
        Structure: Pedison Advisory standalone raise<br>
        Combined fleet target: 165 units post-close<br>
        <span class="badge badge-navy">LOGISTICS DIVISION</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Column 2: Pipeline -->
    <div class="division-card pipeline">
      <div class="div-tag pipeline-tag">PIPELINE · SYLVANIA, GA CAMPUS</div>
      <div class="div-name">Cold Storage &amp; Industrial Facility</div>
      <div class="div-desc">
        525 Industrial Park Road, Sylvania, GA 30467. 35,000 SF cold storage / food processing, 
        6,600 SF hydrocooler, 20.08 acres, 58 miles to Port of Savannah.
      </div>
      <div class="div-detail">
        Structure: Lease-option · $17K/month<br>
        Purpose: Reefer ops · Flatbed ops · Steel co-location<br>
        Listing broker: Tyler Mouchet · Colliers Savannah<br>
        <span class="badge badge-red">INDUSTRIAL DIVISION</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card pipeline">
      <div class="div-tag pipeline-tag">PIPELINE · SYLVANIA, GA</div>
      <div class="div-name">Steel Plant Operations</div>
      <div class="div-desc">
        Steel manufacturing or processing operation to be co-located at the Sylvania industrial 
        campus alongside cold storage and future data center infrastructure.
      </div>
      <div class="div-detail">
        Status: Scope under definition<br>
        Location: 525 Industrial Park Road campus<br>
        <span class="badge badge-red">MANUFACTURING DIVISION</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card pipeline">
      <div class="div-tag pipeline-tag">PIPELINE · SYLVANIA, GA</div>
      <div class="div-name">Data Center Development</div>
      <div class="div-desc">
        Data center infrastructure project in Sylvania, Georgia — part of David Little's 
        stated 3–5 year vision to develop digital infrastructure and create high-quality 
        technology jobs in the region.
      </div>
      <div class="div-detail">
        Vision: Support digital infrastructure in Georgia<br>
        Status: Under development<br>
        <span class="badge badge-red">TECHNOLOGY DIVISION</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card pipeline">
      <div class="div-tag pipeline-tag">PIPELINE · RENEWABLE ENERGY</div>
      <div class="div-name">Solar Farm Development</div>
      <div class="div-desc">
        Expanding solar farm development as part of the Jireh renewable energy vertical — 
        advancing energy independence and environmental stewardship across the Southeast.
      </div>
      <div class="div-detail">
        Vision: Energy independence · Job creation<br>
        Status: 3–5 year strategic pillar<br>
        <span class="badge badge-red">ENERGY DIVISION</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Existing DBAs -->
    <div class="division-card future">
      <div class="div-tag future-tag">DBA · REGISTERED</div>
      <div class="div-name">Daridym Logistics LLC</div>
      <div class="div-desc">Registered logistics entity under the Jireh umbrella.</div>
      <div class="div-detail"><span class="badge badge-gold">LOGISTICS DIVISION</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card future">
      <div class="div-tag future-tag">DBA · REGISTERED</div>
      <div class="div-name">Rightouch Technology</div>
      <div class="div-desc">Technology entity under the Jireh holding structure.</div>
      <div class="div-detail"><span class="badge badge-gold">TECHNOLOGY DIVISION</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card future">
      <div class="div-tag future-tag">DBA · REGISTERED</div>
      <div class="div-name">Generation Legacy Group</div>
      <div class="div-desc">Legacy and generational wealth platform. Community development focus.</div>
      <div class="div-detail"><span class="badge badge-gold">COMMUNITY DIVISION</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card future">
      <div class="div-tag future-tag">DBA · REGISTERED</div>
      <div class="div-name">D&amp;C Legacy Equity</div>
      <div class="div-desc">Equity holding entity for legacy investments and real property.</div>
      <div class="div-detail"><span class="badge badge-gold">EQUITY DIVISION</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card future">
      <div class="div-tag future-tag">INTERNATIONAL · REGISTERED</div>
      <div class="div-name">Vichore Development Limited</div>
      <div class="div-desc">Uganda-based manufacturing operations — global footprint entity for production capacity and international market development.</div>
      <div class="div-detail">Location: Uganda<br><span class="badge badge-gold">INTERNATIONAL DIVISION</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="division-card future">
      <div class="div-tag future-tag">DBA · REGISTERED</div>
      <div class="div-name">P&amp;J Equity Partners</div>
      <div class="div-desc">Equity partnership entity within the Jireh corporate family.</div>
      <div class="div-detail"><span class="badge badge-gold">EQUITY DIVISION</span></div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <p style="margin-top:32px; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:12px; color:var(--label); line-height:1.6; padding:16px 20px; background:var(--white); border-left:3px solid var(--gold);">
    <strong style="color:var(--navy);">Brand Rule:</strong> The Jireh Corporation mark is a holding company identity only. 
    JDS Express LLC and all subsidiary companies carry their own operational branding beneath the Jireh parent. 
    Jireh does not describe itself as a logistics company. It is a diversified holding company that owns a logistics company.
  </p>
</div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 3 — COLOR SYSTEM
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 03</div>
  <div class="section-title">Color System</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>
  <p class="section-intro">
    Four primary colors approved by the client. Hierarchy is strict: Navy leads, 
    Gold commands attention, Black anchors, Orange and Red signal division-level urgency.
  </p>

  <div class="color-grid">
    <div class="color-swatch">
      <div class="swatch-block" style="background:#0C2044;"></div>
      <div class="swatch-info">
        <div class="swatch-name">Moriah Navy</div>
        <div class="swatch-hex">#0C2044</div>
        <div class="swatch-use">Primary brand color. Corporate authority. Primary backgrounds, wordmark on light fields.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="color-swatch">
      <div class="swatch-block" style="background:#C8960A;"></div>
      <div class="swatch-info">
        <div class="swatch-name">Provision Gold</div>
        <div class="swatch-hex">#C8960A</div>
        <div class="swatch-use">Accent and emphasis. Faith symbolism. Rules, horn mark, baseline, tagline accents.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="color-swatch">
      <div class="swatch-block" style="background:#0F0E0B;"></div>
      <div class="swatch-info">
        <div class="swatch-name">Summit Black</div>
        <div class="swatch-hex">#0F0E0B</div>
        <div class="swatch-use">Fleet mark, high-contrast applications, ram silhouette on white fields, truck door.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="color-swatch">
      <div class="swatch-block" style="background:#9C1A1A;"></div>
      <div class="swatch-info">
        <div class="swatch-name">Covenant Red</div>
        <div class="swatch-hex">#9C1A1A</div>
        <div class="swatch-use">Alert, urgency, select division tags. Never primary. Used sparingly with full intent.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:32px;">
    <div class="type-label">SECONDARY PALETTE</div>
    <div class="color-secondary">
      <div>
        <div class="swatch-mini" style="background:#1A3A6A;"><span>Navy Mid</span></div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--label);margin-top:5px;">#1A3A6A · Depth layer</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="swatch-mini" style="background:#E8B832;"><span>Gold Light</span></div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--label);margin-top:5px;">#E8B832 · Rays / glows</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="swatch-mini" style="background:#C84A0A;"><span>Orange</span></div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--label);margin-top:5px;">#C84A0A · Pipeline tags</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="swatch-mini" style="background:#D4A870;"><span>Hand Skin</span></div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--label);margin-top:5px;">#D4A870 · Hand motif only</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:24px; padding:20px 24px; background:var(--off); border-left:3px solid var(--navy);">
      <div class="type-label" style="margin-bottom:10px;">FLEET COLOR NOTE</div>
      <p style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">
        Current JDS Express fleet trucks are white and blue. Post-acquisition, the Jireh wrap program 
        should apply Navy + Gold + Black to white fleet vehicles with the primary mountain-ram mark on 
        the driver door and the full wordmark lock-up on the trailer side. Wrap direction: TBD.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 4 — TYPOGRAPHY
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-off">
<div class="page">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 04</div>
  <div class="section-title">Typography System</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>
  <p class="section-intro">
    Three typefaces. Each has a specific role and must not be used interchangeably.
  </p>

  <div class="type-specimen">
    <div class="type-label">DISPLAY · AUTHORITY FACE</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:48px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); letter-spacing:8px; line-height:1;">JIREH</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:22px; font-weight:400; color:var(--navy); letter-spacing:4px; margin-top:8px;">CORPORATION OF GEORGIA</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:400; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:3px; margin-top:6px;">BY HIS HAND · IN OBEDIENCE · FOR HIS PURPOSE</div>
    <div class="type-role">
      <strong>Cinzel</strong> — Display, wordmark, section headers, all-caps labels, cover hierarchy.<br>
      Use: All-caps only. Minimum 11px. Never in body copy. Paired with gold or navy only.<br>
      Rule: This is the voice of the holding company. Use it when Jireh speaks with full authority.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="type-specimen">
    <div class="type-label">EDITORIAL · FAITH VOICE</div>
    <div style="font-family:'EB Garamond',serif; font-size:32px; font-style:italic; color:var(--text); line-height:1.3;">
      On the mountain of the Lord<br>it will be provided.
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'EB Garamond',serif; font-size:18px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.6;">
      Jireh Corporation of Georgia is a diversified holding company that acquires, 
      develops, and manages businesses across transportation, manufacturing, and 
      community development.
    </div>
    <div class="type-role">
      <strong>EB Garamond</strong> — Body copy, pull quotes, taglines, brand story, faith-rooted narrative.<br>
      Use: Italic for quotes and scripture references. Regular for long-form prose. 16–22px range.<br>
      Rule: This is the voice of the story. Use it when Jireh speaks with depth and conviction.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="type-specimen">
    <div class="type-label">OPERATIONAL · UTILITY FACE</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:24px; font-weight:600; color:var(--navy); letter-spacing:1px;">Acquisition · Capital · Logistics</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:400; color:var(--muted); margin-top:8px; line-height:1.6;">
      43 trucks · 62 drivers · Garden City, GA · Port of Savannah<br>
      JDS Express LLC · Fast-Tek Express LLC · Daridym Logistics LLC
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:3px; margin-top:10px;">
      SECTION 01 · COMPANY INFORMATION · JUNE 2026
    </div>
    <div class="type-role">
      <strong>Inter</strong> — UI, data tables, labels, captions, navigation, all operational collateral.<br>
      Use: Sentence case for copy. ALL CAPS only for short labels ≤4 words with letter-spacing.<br>
      Rule: This is the operational voice. Never use it for the primary wordmark or scripture.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 5 — LOGO SYSTEM
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 05</div>
  <div class="section-title">Logo System</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>
  <p class="section-intro">
    Six professional logo concepts developed for Jireh Corporation of Georgia, each assessed 
    for its recommended application across the brand system. The primary recommendation: 
    Concept 02 as the operational mark, Concept 01 as the document and boardroom wordmark, 
    Concept 06 as the covenant seal variant.
  </p>

  <!-- CONCEPT 01 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:#0C2044;padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;">
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#C8960A;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:700;">CONCEPT 01 — PURE WORDMARK · INSTITUTIONAL AUTHORITY</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:1.5px;">DARK FIELD · SILVER METALLIC · GOLD RULE</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;background:#081526;text-align:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:block;margin:0 auto;" alt="Concept 1 — Pure Wordmark on Navy"/>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;padding:20px 28px;background:#FAFAF6;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;color:#6A6456;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Assessment —</strong> The most timeless of the six. Silver metallic treatment on the serif wordmark delivers prestige and institutional gravity. The gold rule beneath JIREH is the only accent and it earns its place. No icon means no standalone mark for social or fleet — but as a pure wordmark for formal contexts this is unmatched in the set.<br><br>
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Recommended for:</strong> Boardroom presentations · Investor packages · Executive stationery · Closing documents · Dark-field applications
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CONCEPT 02 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:#0C2044;padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;border-left:4px solid #C8960A;">
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#C8960A;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:700;">CONCEPT 02 — MOUNTAIN + RAM HORN · ★ PRIMARY RECOMMENDED MARK</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:1.5px;">DARK FIELD · SILVER + GOLD · GENESIS 22 ICONOGRAPHY</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #C8960A;border-top:none;background:#081526;text-align:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:block;margin:0 auto;" alt="Concept 2 — Mountain Ram Horn Primary Mark"/>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #C8960A;border-top:none;padding:20px 28px;background:#FDF8EC;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;color:#6A6456;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Assessment —</strong> This is the mark that honors the full brief. The faceted mountain range is professionally rendered. The gold ram horn rising from the peak is immediately readable at any scale. The silver metallic JIREH wordmark carries institutional weight. The only mark in the set with a standalone icon that works at truck-door, gate sign, and social media scale. It tells the Genesis 22 story without a single word.<br><br>
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Recommended for:</strong> Primary brand identity · Fleet doors and trailer sides · Facility signage · Website hero · Social media icon · Uniforms · All large-format applications
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CONCEPT 03 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:#F5F0E5;border:1px solid #E0DDD5;padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;">
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#0C2044;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:700;">CONCEPT 03 — GOLD J MONOGRAM · CORPORATE STATIONERY</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#9A9080;letter-spacing:1.5px;">LIGHT FIELD · GOLD J + NAVY · GOLD RULE</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;background:#FFFFFF;text-align:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:block;margin:0 auto;" alt="Concept 3 — Gold J Monogram Light Field"/>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;padding:20px 28px;background:#FAFAF6;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;color:#6A6456;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Assessment —</strong> The gold J as a differentiating typographic element against the navy letterforms is a smart, disciplined choice. Clean enough for letterhead and legal documents. The light field gives the brand versatility the dark-field concepts cannot cover alone. Sophisticated without being decorative — appropriate for professional services positioning.<br><br>
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Recommended for:</strong> Corporate letterhead · Business cards · Proposals · Website header on white · Light-field documents
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CONCEPT 04 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:#F5F0E5;border:1px solid #E0DDD5;padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;">
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetice Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#0C2044;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:700;">CONCEPT 04 — SHOFAR / INFRASTRUCTURE STRIPE · DIVISIONAL USE</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#9A9080;letter-spacing:1.5px;">LIGHT FIELD · GOLD SHOFAR J · STRIPE LETTERFORMS</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;background:#FFFFFF;text-align:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:block;margin:0 auto;" alt="Concept 4 — Shofar Infrastructure Stripe"/>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;padding:20px 28px;background:#FAFAF6;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;color:#6A6456;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Assessment —</strong> The gold J reads as a shofar — the ram's horn blown as an instrument of divine announcement — while the horizontal stripe treatment on IREH evokes infrastructure, data, and forward motion simultaneously. Bold and modern. The dual symbolism is intentional and effective. Too stylized for the holding company level, but strong as a divisional mark for the technology or data center entity.<br><br>
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Recommended for:</strong> Rightouch Technology · Data center division · Digital and tech-forward applications · Subsidiary brand identity
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CONCEPT 05 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:#F5F0E5;border:1px solid #E0DDD5;padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;">
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#0C2044;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:700;">CONCEPT 05 — GOLD J + THORN BRANCH (NAVY) · COVENANT VARIANT A</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#9A9080;letter-spacing:1.5px;">LIGHT FIELD · NAVY + GOLD · THORN THICKET</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;background:#FFFFFF;text-align:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:block;margin:0 auto;" alt="Concept 5 — Thorn Branch Navy"/>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #E0DDD5;border-top:none;padding:20px 28px;background:#FAFAF6;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;color:#6A6456;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Assessment —</strong> The gold thorn branch is the most direct visual reference to the thicket where the ram was caught in Genesis 22. The navy and gold palette is disciplined and on-brief. The thorn serves as both the divider between JIREH and "Corporation of Georgia" and as the primary narrative symbol — typographic structure and storytelling unified. Strong craft in the thorn illustration.<br><br>
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Recommended for:</strong> Covenant-forward communications · Faith-community facing materials · Formal events · Community development and legacy division materials
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CONCEPT 06 -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:#F5F0E5;border:1px solid #E0DDD5;padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;border-left:4px solid #9C1A1A;">
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#9C1A1A;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:700;">CONCEPT 06 — CRIMSON + GOLD THORN · ★ COVENANT VARIANT B RECOMMENDED</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#9A9080;letter-spacing:1.5px;">LIGHT FIELD · CRIMSON + GOLD · BLOOD COVENANT</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #9C1A1A;border-top:none;background:#FFFFFF;text-align:center;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;max-width:860px;display:block;margin:0 auto;" alt="Concept 6 — Crimson Gold Thorn Covenant Mark"/>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid #9C1A1A;border-top:none;padding:20px 28px;background:#FDF5F5;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;color:#6A6456;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Assessment —</strong> The most theologically specific mark of the six. The crimson wordmark references the blood covenant — the sacrifice, the substitution, the ram caught in the thicket so Isaac would not die. The gold thorn branch has superior dimensional rendering compared to Concept 05, with deeper shadows and richer color variation. The all-crimson typography with the gold thorn is bold enough to hold at fleet and signage scale while carrying unmistakable covenant meaning to those who know the story.<br><br>
        <strong style="color:#0C2044;">Recommended for:</strong> Covenant seal · Official legacy documents · Faith-rooted external communications · Community impact materials · Alternate primary mark if David and Crystal confirm the thorn as the defining symbol
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RECOMMENDATION SUMMARY BLOCK -->
  <div style="background:#0C2044;padding:36px 40px;border-left:5px solid #C8960A;border-radius:4px;margin-top:48px;">
    <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:#C8960A;letter-spacing:3px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:24px;">PEDISON RECOMMENDATION — THREE-MARK PRIMARY SYSTEM</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:32px;">
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:10px;">PRIMARY OPERATING MARK</div>
        <div style="font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-size:18px;color:#FFFFFF;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;">Concept 02</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#C8960A;margin-bottom:10px;">Mountain + Ram Horn</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">Fleet · Signage · Website · Social · Uniforms · All large-format applications</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:10px;">DOCUMENT / BOARDROOM MARK</div>
        <div style="font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-size:18px;color:#FFFFFF;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;">Concept 01</div>

        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">Investor documents · Letterhead · Closing packages · Executive stationery</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:10px;">COVENANT / LEGACY MARK</div>
        <div style="font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-size:18px;color:#FFFFFF;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;">Concept 06</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#C8960A;margin-bottom:10px;">Crimson + Gold Thorn</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">Faith-forward · Legacy materials · Community impact · Covenant documents</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-dark">
<div class="page">

  <div class="section-title section-title-light">Taglines &amp; Voice</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>
  <p class="section-intro" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);">
    Crystal indicated taglines are listed in connected division documents. 
    The following are candidates based on the brand brief, questionnaire answers, and 
    Genesis 22:14 positioning. Select one primary tagline for the holding company and 
    assign supporting lines per division.
  </p>

  <div class="tagline-list">
    <div class="tagline-item" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
      <div class="tagline-num">01</div>
      <div class="tagline-text" style="color:#FFFFFF;">The Lord Will Provide.</div>

    </div>
    <div class="tagline-item" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">

    </div>
    <div class="tagline-item" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">

      <div class="tagline-note" style="color:var(--gold);">Visual brand voice · Print &amp; fleet</div>
    </div>

      <div class="tagline-num">06</div>

      <div class="tagline-note" style="color:var(--gold);">JDS Express division only · Operations</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 7 — BRAND VOICE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 07</div>
  <div class="section-title">Brand Voice &amp; Tone</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>
  <p class="section-intro">
    Approved tone by Crystal Salter, COO: <strong>Direct. Authoritative.</strong> 
    Culture words: Leadership. Innovation. Empowerment. The brand does not beg for attention. 
    It commands it — quietly.
  </p>

  <div class="tone-grid">
    <div class="tone-card">
      <h4 class="do">JIREH SPEAKS LIKE THIS</h4>
      <ul>
        <li class="do">Direct statements. No hedging. No filler words.</li>
        <li class="do">Faith-rooted without being preachy. The story is embedded, not announced.</li>
        <li class="do">Authoritative voice. Jireh does not ask — it demonstrates.</li>
        <li class="do">Community language: job creation, legacy, generational wealth.</li>
        <li class="do">Specifics over generalities: port, tonnage, lanes, jobs created.</li>
        <li class="do">Long-horizon language: 3–5 years, next generation, building for tomorrow.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="tone-card tone-card-alt">
      <h4 class="dont">JIREH NEVER SPEAKS LIKE THIS</h4>
      <ul>
        <li class="dont">Industry jargon without meaning: "synergies," "solutions," "leverage."</li>
        <li class="dont">Startup energy: "disrupting," "game-changing," "scaling fast."</li>
        <li class="dont">"We're a trucking company." — Jireh is not a trucking company.</li>
        <li class="dont">Corporate blandness: "committed to excellence in service delivery."</li>
        <li class="dont">Competitor comparisons. Jireh stands on its own ground.</li>
        <li class="dont">False humility. The ram was provided. We ascended the mountain.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 9 — BRAND RULES
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="section-number">SECTION 09</div>
  <div class="section-title">Non-Negotiable Brand Rules</div>
  <div class="section-rule"></div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;">

    <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;padding:24px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);align-items:flex-start;">
      <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:32px;padding-top:2px;">01</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;">JIREH IS NOT A LOGISTICS COMPANY</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Jireh Corporation of Georgia is a diversified holding company. JDS Express LLC is the logistics company. This distinction must be maintained in all brand communications, press materials, website copy, and investor presentations. Jireh owns a logistics company. It does not haul freight.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;padding:24px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);align-items:flex-start;background:var(--off);">
      <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:32px;padding-top:2px;">02</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;">THE MARK IS SACRED — DO NOT DILUTE IT</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">The mountain-ram-hand mark embodies Genesis 22:14. Do not stretch it, recolor it in unapproved colors, add effects to it, place it on busy backgrounds, or separate the mark elements. The mark is presented whole, always. If a format cannot fit the full mark, use the wordmark only.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;padding:24px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);align-items:flex-start;">
      <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:32px;padding-top:2px;">03</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;">SUBSIDIARY BRANDS ARE SUBORDINATE</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">JDS Express, Fast-Tek Express, Daridym Logistics, and all operating subsidiaries have their own identities. They may use the line "A Jireh Corporation Company" in small type at the base of their materials. The Jireh primary mark does not appear large-format on subsidiary fleet or uniforms.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;padding:24px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);align-items:flex-start;background:var(--off);">
      <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:32px;padding-top:2px;">04</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;">GOLD IS AN ACCENT — NOT A FIELD COLOR</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Provision Gold (#C8960A) is used for rules, horn elements, baselines, tag labels, and select text. It is never a full background color on large formats. Its power comes from scarcity. When gold appears, the viewer's eye must be drawn to something that matters.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;padding:24px 28px;align-items:flex-start;">
      <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:32px;padding-top:2px;">05</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;">THE STORY IS NEVER OPTIONAL</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Every brand touchpoint for Jireh Corporation — every document cover, every website hero, every investor presentation — should carry the DNA of Genesis 22:14. The story of provision, obedience, and divine intervention is not a decorative theme. It is the company's founding testimony. It must be present, always, even if only encoded in the mark itself.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
